title: Escrow lifecycle + expiry auto-refund (M4 liveness, M9 sentence 3)
deliverable: escrow accounts funded by initiators; every escrow carries expires_at; expiry without settlement auto-refunds (the V-LIVE guarantee, model-checked in P4)

acceptance.expiry_refund: stalled escrow auto-refunds at expires_at ± one sweep; zero escrow older than bound at any audit
